untranslatable_reason: The signal requires construction of a decile-ranked portfolio based on call/put ratio derived from option flow (open buy volume). This requires: (1) real-time call/put ratio calculation from options market data, (2) decile ranking across a basket of stocks, and (3) dynamic portfolio rebalancing logic. None of these are available in the provided price/technical indicator set. The vol_ratio_20 (equity volume ratio) is not equivalent to options call/put ratio. A proper implementation requires external options data feeds and portfolio construction logic outside the backtest engine's scope.
translation_notes: Signal based on options market microstructure (call/put ratio from open buy volume) cannot be translated to price-action and technical indicators alone. Would require dedicated options analytics module.
